candidates.row_label: Net increase/(decrease) in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Cash flow movement, not period-end cash stock for balance sheet CHE.

candidates.why: Could include miscellaneous current debt, but there is a cleaner debt-current line available.

candidates.row_label: Current-portion of debt to financial institution
candidates.why: Explicit current portion of financial debt; best match for short-term debt/current maturities. Excludes leases.

final_choice.row_label: Current-portion of debt to financial institution

variables.notes: Chose a more precise label outside the shortlist. It directly captures current maturities of financial debt and avoids lease liabilities and likely avoids broader/non-debt items in 'Other current debt'.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Exact semantic match, even though preview values are blank in shown columns.

Gross PPE, less preferred than total/net PPE.

candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Payment for property plant and equipment
candidates.why: Capex cash flow, not PPE balance-sheet stock.

variables.notes: Priority list favors the cleaner total PPE label first, with the alternate PPE label second for years where wording may change.
